seo.title: BINGO Entertainment - All-Scene Entertainment · One-Stop Excitement
seo.keywords: BINGO, BINGO Entertainment, Web3, Short Drama, Mini Game, Social Ecosystem, GGC, Tokenomics
seo.description: BINGO Entertainment is committed to breaking the Web2 platform traffic monopoly and benefit consolidation through the GGC base chain. Boutique short dramas, casual games, and a co-built social ecosystem interlock with each other to construct a mutually beneficial, exponentially growing digital entertainment value network.

pains.item1_desc: High traffic costs vs. low retention make user value monetization highly challenging.
pains.item2_desc: Mainly speculative and short-term driven, neglecting core content and utility.
pains.item3_desc: Extremely difficult for capital to identify and filter high-retention prospective projects.

opps.item1_desc: Expected to exceed $33B by 2025, driving massive tokenized distribution.
opps.item2_desc: Expected to reach $20B by 2025, combining high user reach with instant conversion.
opps.item3_desc: Over 50M digital nomads, fueling remote creative output and collaborative growth.
opps.item4_desc: Compliant funds & policies make HK BINGO's gateway to global blue oceans.

pillars.title: Three Core Business Pillars
pillars.subtitle: Centering on the digital earth, premium vertical dramas, casual games, and a shareable social ecosystem link together to weave a prosperous Web3 value network.

game.title: Games: Start in 1 Minute, Share Ecological Dividends
game.desc: Highly engaging hyper-casual games converting fragmented leisure hours into ecological point rights. Backed by GGC protocol, returning game ownership back to community co-builders.

drama.title: Dramas: Premium Vertical Screens, Watch & Earn Points
drama.desc: Premium content library, seamless watch-to-earn logic with low barrier, and real-time multi-modal AI translations bridging international traffic with highly efficient monetization channels.

social.title: UGC & Digital Nomad Community
social.desc: Integrating online and offline industries and finance, local lifestyle X social networking, constructing a brand-new globalized collaborative community and decentralized value network.

planning.title: Global Strategic Layout
planning.subtitle: China Mainland, Hong Kong, and Malaysia — three structural opportunity windows are opening. Localized content, global incentives, and standardized ad networks.
planning.mid_title: From China Prototypes to 1 Billion User Markets

china.label: China Mainland
china.title: Global Coverage: Strong R&D Power & Source of Global Products
china.description: The Greater China region is the most solid tech backend for BINGO. Self-developed core game engines, multi-lingual AI voice cloning models, and real-time translation algorithms are built here, empowering dozens of international markets.

hk.label: Hong Kong, China
hk.title: Global Coverage: Licensed Funds Support & International Capital Hub
hk.description: As the ideal compliant Web3 harbor, Hong Kong provides BINGO with robust virtual asset licensing frameworks, licensed custodian funds, and globalized multi-national expansion gateways.

malaysia.label: Malaysia
malaysia.tag: SE Asia Creative Hub & Nomad Center
malaysia.title: Global Coverage: Incubator of 100,000 Digital Content Creators
malaysia.description: Driven by the 'Beach' and 'Wave' campaigns, Malaysia is BINGO's content adaptation frontier, gathering thousands of high-quality multi-lingual short video creators and digital nomads leveraging multi-modal AI.

sea.label: Southeast Asia
sea.title: Global Coverage: 680M Incremental Digital Entertainment Users
sea.description: Southeast Asia possesses high-frequency digital entertainment and casual gaming habits. BINGO's low-barrier watch-to-earn and play-to-earn instant-play model easily sweeps regional app store lists.

eco.title: Six Highlights
eco.subtitle: Breaking Web2 traffic monopolies and profit locking. BINGO collaborates with users, creators, and compliant capital to build a mutually beneficial, exponentially growing entertainment ecosystem on the bottom architecture of GGC & WebX global platforms.
eco.mid_title_secondary: Building the Ultimate Web3 Entertainment Closed Loop

pos.title: POS Value Growth + GGC Chain
pos.subtitle: The larger the traffic and user base, the higher the ecosystem value and user rights.
pos.description: Through our unique 'Proof of Stake/Attention (POS)' incentive system and self-developed GGC chain, users' time spent watching dramas or playing games and interaction data instantly convert to ecological point rights, distributing profit directly to builders via smart contracts.

iaa_iap.title: IAA+IAP Hybrid Matrix
iaa_iap.subtitle: Self-developed highly efficient monetization model for win-win results.
iaa_iap.description: Breaking barriers between IAA (ad monetization) and IAP (in-app/points purchases). High-value global advertisers bid for display, allowing a large share of ad revenues to go back into the GGC ecosystem pool or directly reward users, ending zero-sum games.

three_engines.title: Dramas + Games + Social Triple Engines
three_engines.subtitle: Dramas, games, and social platform synergy capturing massive traffic.
three_engines.description: Combining premium vertical dramas and lightweight games with social features and local scenes. Drama content, game assets, social rights, and local services link together. Leveraging multi-scene touchpoints and synergistic operations, it triggers sharing dynamics and scales user growth.

eco_loop.title: Ecological Value Loop
eco_loop.subtitle: Integrating decentralized blockchain tech to build a sustainable network.
eco_loop.description: GGC tokens establish multiple utilities across drama unlocking, games, NFT co-creation copyright royalties, and DAO voting. Supported by fee burns, platform dividend distribution, and ecosystem fund accumulations, it drives robust token appreciation.

wave_plan.title: Wave Plan
wave_plan.subtitle: Incubating a massive UGC content ecosystem and global digital nomad community.
wave_plan.description: The 'Wave Plan' supports over 50 million digital nomads, independent video editors, and creators globally by authorizing access to BINGO's premium copyright library, driving social media traffic on platforms like TikTok and YouTube while enjoying on-chain creative royalties.

beach_plan.title: Beach Plan
beach_plan.subtitle: Supporting creators, capital, and platform in a 'Three-in-One' common prosperity.
beach_plan.description: The 'Beach Plan' incubates 'One Person Companies (OPC)' and creator studios. Initial funding from capital pools, high-matching traffic and GGC copyright tools from BINGO, and hits from creators build a top-tier Web3 content engine.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We welcome strategic global investors, content distribution partners, and sovereign licensing bodies to engage in dialog. All inquiries are typically replied to within 48 hours.
contact.intro_subtitle: Stay connected with BINGO Entertainment. Whether you are seeking business partnerships, media inquiries, or career opportunities, you can reach out via the form below or directly connect with our professional team.
contact.info_subtitle: Supporting global business and collaboration communication, our team is ready to respond to your needs.

join.title: Careers
join.subtitle: Join BINGO to co-create the global Web3 entertainment ecosystem. Here, every creative spark is valued.

pm.title: Game Product Manager
responsibilities: Responsible for hyper-casual games planning and iterations, overseeing core mechanics and retention metrics.
Optimize user experience continuously based on data, raising active metrics, retention, and monetization efficiency.
Coordinate with R&D, Art, and Publishing teams to drive high-quality and timely project deliveries.
Conduct competitor analysis and formulate localization strategies and operations plans for global game releases.
Explore tokenized system design and deep integration with in-game reward/points protocols.
requirements: 3-5+ years product management experience in games or hyper-casual games, with successful live operations records.
Keen insights into market trends and user psychology, proficient in game balancing and level designs.
Excellent data analysis, communication, collaboration, and pressure management skills.

operations.title: Drama Content Specialist
responsibilities: Oversee选题, scheduling, and distribution strategies for premium vertical dramas, uncovering high-potential topics.
Monitor multi-platform data performance, optimizing content placement and traffic conversion funnels.
Coordinate with multi-lingual editing talent and digital nomad networks to drive localized viral distribution.
Expand licensing, translation partners, and regional distribution networks to integrate the industry chain.
Analyze user feedback and behavior profiles to guide the content pipeline for subsequent phases.
requirements: 2-4 years vertical drama, short video, or new media operations experience, familiar with major global video platforms.
Strong aesthetic senses and content sensitivity, skilled in script analysis and traffic growth mechanics.
Fluent in English, experience in cross-border/multi-lingual content distribution is highly preferred.

blockchain.title: Web3 Blockchain Engineer
responsibilities: Design, develop, and audit the security of the ecosystem token economy and smart contracts.
Build secure conduits linking on-chain data with core business systems, protecting asset transaction flows.
Track compliance and cutting-edge industry technology, optimizing underlying chain and ecosystem architecture.
Formulate multi-chain deployment solutions, including but not limited to Ethereum, Solana, and Layer 2 networks.
Optimize consensus mechanics to boost high-concurrency transaction throughput on-chain.
requirements: 3+ years blockchain engineering experience, proficient in Solidity, Rust, or Go.
Familiar with Ethereum, GGC, and other mainstream public chains, with DeFi or GameFi project histories.
Strong security awareness, familiar with common smart contract vulnerabilities and defense tactics.

ai.title: AI Algorithm Engineer
responsibilities: Research and optimize multi-lingual voice cloning and real-time translation models.
Construct multi-modal AI toolchains to empower creative adaptations and localized publishing.
Drive algorithm deployment and engineering, ensuring inference performance and scalability.
Explore LLM integrations for intelligent customer services, AI scriptwriters, and localized translation agents.
Maintain algorithm assets and manage preprocessing and feature extraction for large audio-visual data.
requirements: 3+ years research experience in NLP, speech algorithms, or multi-modal algorithms with a Master's degree or above.
Proficient in PyTorch/TensorFlow, with hands-on experience in LLM fine-tuning methodologies.
Prior experience in voice cloning, TTS, or real-time translation production deployment is preferred.

market.title: Overseas BD Manager
responsibilities: Drive channel expansion and ecosystem partnerships across Southeast Asia and global markets.
Interface with local e-wallets, streaming sites, and publishing alliances to form distribution loops.
Formulate regional growth campaigns and incentive schemes to scale users and revenues.
Represent BINGO at global Web3 & entertainment summits to elevate brand presence.
Monitor regional competitor activities and compliance frameworks to secure overseas operations.
requirements: 3+ years experience in global market development, business development (BD), or publishing operations.
Familiar with SE Asian payments and media landscapes, with strong local partnership resources.
Superb negotiation and cross-cultural communication skills, business fluent in English.

designer.title: UI / Visual Designer
responsibilities: Design product interfaces and build the visual identity guidelines for BINGO.
Deliver high-fidelity interface layouts and animations to elevate product immersion and aesthetic quality.
Work closely with front-end developers in design reviews to ensure precise implementation.
Produce promotional assets, landing page graphics, and community visuals for global markets.
Participate in user research and run continuous user experience iterations based on testing feedbacks.
requirements: 2-5 years experience designing mobile apps, web, or games, with art or design majors preferred.
Proficient in Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator, with animation/motion graphics capabilities.
Great aesthetic sense, detail-oriented, and highly responsive to modern design trends.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy Statement
privacy.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your privacy. The following explains our policies and practices on collecting, using, and protecting personal data.
privacy.p1: BINGO Entertainment ('we', 'us') attaches great importance to user privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when using our platform services (including dramas, games, and social ecologies).

sections.s1_p1: To offer safe and high-quality entertainment, we collect information in the following contexts:
sections.s1_li1: Registration & Verification: When registering a BINGO account, we collect usernames, emails, or bound third-party social credentials.
sections.s1_li2: Device & Log Data: When visiting our site, we automatically gather your IP address, browser type, OS, timestamps, and page click paths.
sections.s1_li3: Communication: When you submit form inquiries or email us, we record your name, company, email, and content of communications.
sections.s2_p1: All collected data is strictly utilized for the following purposes:
sections.s2_li1: Provide, maintain, and optimize platform services;
sections.s2_li2: Process business proposals, inquiries, or career applications;
sections.s2_li3: Send notices, security warnings, or ecosystem updates you subscribe to;
sections.s2_li4: Fulfill legal compliance obligations and secure our operations.
sections.s3_p1: We pledge never to sell or abuse your private data. Information is only disclosed in rare, compliant situations:
sections.s3_li1: When we obtain your explicit consent or authorization;
sections.s3_li2: In response to court subpoenas, regulatory agencies, or legal processes;
sections.s3_li3: With trusted partners helping us deliver services under strict privacy and confidentiality agreements.
sections.s4_p1: We employ top-tier security standards to safeguard your data:
sections.s4_li1: On-chain transactions and token flows are protected by cryptography and distributed consensus, storing no plain private credentials.
sections.s4_li2: We use TLS/SSL encryption for data in transit and multi-layer encryption for data stored at rest on servers.
sections.s4_li3: In case of security breaches, we will initiate emergency response plans and notify affected users in a timely manner.
sections.s5_p1: Under relevant legal frameworks, you hold the following rights regarding your data:
sections.s5_li1: Access, correct, or update your personal profile records;
sections.s5_li2: Request BINGO to delete your account and erase related personal data stores;
sections.s5_li3: Manage cookie setups in your browser or unsubscribe from ecosystem update emails.
sections.s6_p1: We may update this policy periodically. If key changes are made, we will post notices on our platform showing the revised dates. For privacy-related inquiries, please email us.

privacy.note: Note: This policy is governed and interpreted by BINGO Entertainment and its Compliance Operations Committee.

game_universe.title: Olé Game
game_universe.description: BINGO Games is a one-stop solution for distribution and operation management. It integrates core modules such as multi-role permission backend, viral promotion system, all-terminal coverage, sub-account transactions, welfare operations, and data statistics, providing platform owners, channels, and game developers with full-link services from integration to monetization.
game_universe.card_loop_desc: We provide game distribution and operation capabilities, and further penetrate vertical scenarios such as game studios and power leveling through sub-account SDK and transaction systems, supporting bulk generation, auto-binding, and platform listing of sub-accounts, with transaction commissions.
game_universe.card_term_desc: The platform fully adapts to multiple terminals such as PC websites, mobile WAP, H5 joint operations, and Apple web boxes, and supports generating independent brand sites (OEM distribution) for downstream channels, flexibly expanding business boundaries.
game_universe.slogan: Connect to the New World, Start Your Adventure!
game_universe.slogan_sub: Enter the game lobby now and start your play-to-earn journey. BINGO Games is waiting for you.

drama_universe.title: BINGO Short Drama
drama_universe.subtitle: Global Premium Short Drama Platform, Making Entertainment More Valuable
drama_universe.description: The BINGO short drama platform is committed to building a globalized premium short drama ecology, aggregating massive high-quality vertical screen short drama content, and providing users with immersive, high-quality viewing experiences. The platform integrates AI intelligent recommendation, AI seamless ad engine, globalized operations, and creator ecology to connect users, content, brands, and creators, building a more open, efficient, and sustainable digital entertainment content platform.
drama_universe.card_loop_desc: Covers popular genres such as urban romance, sweet love, comeback, mystery, fantasy, time-travel, family, and workplace, continuously updating high-quality content to satisfy different viewers.
drama_universe.card_term_desc: Supports multi-lingual and multi-regional operations, providing localized content presentation for different countries. Features multi-language switching, multi-regional content recommendation, localized operations, and global payment systems.
drama_universe.slogan: Enter the World of Drama, Set Sail Now!
drama_universe.slogan_sub: Enter the drama lobby now and enjoy wonderful audiovisual experiences. A large number of exclusive hit dramas are waiting for you.

social_universe.title: Bingo Social
social_universe.subtitle: Connecting Interests, Meeting More Wonders
social_universe.description: Bingo Social is a new generation interest-based social platform under Bingo Entertainment. Through AI intelligent matching, interest communities, and offline activity connections, it creates a more authentic, secure, and valuable social experience for global users.
social_universe.card_loop_desc: Unlike traditional chat applications, Bingo Social does not just stop at online interaction. It focuses on interests like films, food, travel, and sports to bridge online matching with offline interactive experiences, making every connection natural and real.
social_universe.card_term_desc: Bingo Social, Short Drama, and Game build a complete digital entertainment ecosystem together. Users can establish connections over a drama, a game, or an activity, discovering common interests to form richer social experiences.
social_universe.slogan_sub: Explore more interests, meet more friends, and unlock your wonderful social experiences. Bingo Social is looking forward to meeting you.

inquiry.title: Latest Updates
inquiry.subtitle: Get the latest official announcements, company news, and product iteration updates from BINGO Entertainment platform.
inquiry.disclaimer: [Disclaimer] This article is sourced from the internet and represents the author's personal views. It does not reflect the position of our company and is for reference only. Our company assumes no responsibility for the authenticity or accuracy of the content. If there are issues regarding copyright, versions, or other matters, please contact us promptly, and we will address it immediately.
inquiry.author: Author

item_0.title: BINGO Entertainment completes a new round of strategic financing to accelerate the global layout of the Web3 ecosystem
item_0.desc: This round of strategic financing will be mainly used to deepen GGC underlying chain technology R&D, expand the global short drama and game distribution network, and accelerate the construction of a decentralized Web3 entertainment content co-construction ecosystem.
content: BINGO Entertainment today officially announced the completion of a new round of strategic financing worth tens of millions of US dollars. This round was led by globally renowned Web3 venture capital institutions, with participation from several digital entertainment funds and early ecosystem co-builders.

It is reported that the funds raised in this round will be mainly utilized for several core directions: first, to deepen the R&D of the platform's proprietary blockchain infrastructure (GGC underlying chain) to improve decentralized copyright validation and token circulation settlement efficiency; second, to expand the copyright acquisition and distribution networks for global premium short dramas and high-quality casual games; and finally, to accelerate the construction of a decentralized creators organization (DAO) to incubate a global, co-built, and shared community of entertainment interests.

A partner of the lead investor stated: 'BINGO Entertainment uses blockchain technology to break the deadlock of high commission fees and traffic monopolies in Web2 platforms, creating a win-win closed-loop economy that tightly binds creators, the platform, and users. We are highly optimistic about the growth potential of the BINGO ecosystem and the disruptive space of Web3 entertainment.'

item_1.title: New version of BINGO Short Drama online: introducing AI multi-language seamless translation engine
item_1.desc: The new version achieves character mouth-syncing and local dialect dubbing in short drama videos through AI seamless translation technology, bringing a seamless immersive viewing experience to users of different cultural backgrounds worldwide.
content: BINGO Short Drama platform today released a major product upgrade, with the global version of the app officially launching its self-developed AI multi-language seamless translation engine (Seamless AI-Dubbing & Mouth-Sync Engine).

Traditional international distribution of short dramas faces high dubbing costs, long localization cycles, and poor audio-visual lip synchronization that significantly restricts user experience. This version uses cutting-edge voiceprint cloning and intelligent face alignment algorithms to achieve mouth-sync translation in less than a minute, perfectly preserving the actor's original emotion and voice characteristics.

Currently, this translation engine supports seamless mutual translation among more than ten languages including Chinese, English, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, and Malay. The first batch of test videos has achieved an immersive viewing satisfaction rate of over 90% across multiple global markets, significantly accelerating the expansion of high-quality Chinese short dramas overseas.

item_2.title: BINGO invited to attend the Global Web3 Entertainment Innovation Summit and deliver a keynote speech
item_2.desc: At the summit, the BINGO team shared how to break Web2 platform traffic monopolies using token economics and elaborated on the closed-loop ecosystem concept of short dramas, games, and social.
content: The 2026 Global Web3 Digital Entertainment Innovation Summit grandly opened today. As a star project in the industry, the BINGO Entertainment founding team was invited to attend the summit and delivered a keynote speech titled 'Token Economics Reshaping Content Value: The Exploration and Practice of BINGO Ecosystem'.

The speech deeply analyzed the industry pain points of rigid profit distribution, limited survival space for excellent content creators, and users acting merely as passive consumers in traditional entertainment platforms. The BINGO team explained in detail how the platform utilizes the GGC chain's underlying architecture and token model to achieve 'watch dramas, play games, and socialize to mine', returning content dominance and revenue rights to the community.

After the conference, BINGO Entertainment signed strategic cooperation memorandums of understanding with several leading global content delivery network (CDN) providers and Web3 ecosystem partners to jointly construct a more open and decentralized global entertainment content infrastructure.

item_3.title: Olé Game launches multiple hit mini-games, testing of the new power-leveling transaction module begins
item_3.desc: To meet players' diverse trading needs, Olé Game officially launches secure custody and autonomous trading intermediary services for game characters and virtual assets, further closing the loop of the economic model.
content: The Olé Game platform today announced that the brand new lobby of several self-developed and co-released premium mini-games has officially entered testing. Concurrently, the highly anticipated 'Sub-account Trading & Custody Protocol' has launched its limited closed beta.

This protocol introduces a smart contract escrow mechanism, allowing players to securely put idle sub-accounts, equipment, and daily achievement boosts on-chain, list them with one click, and trade freely. The platform acts as an intermediary, charging only a small matching fee, thereby eliminating common frauds such as false information and account recovery in traditional game trading.

The project leader revealed that the first on-chain account transaction completed during the test took only 3 seconds. Its secure and efficient properties won unanimous praise from beta testers, and the system is expected to be fully rolled out to all users next month.

item_4.title: Platform registered users exceed 10 million, announcement of GGC token distribution optimization
item_4.desc: To guarantee long-term stability and healthy inflation of the economic system, the platform has decided to adjust the output ratio of GGC in ecosystem internal tests and daily tasks, and add large-amount token staking dividend channels.
content: Since its launch, BINGO Entertainment has officially surpassed 10 million registered users globally thanks to its premium content and co-creation model. To reward the community, the platform today officially released an announcement regarding GGC token distribution optimization and long-term staking dividend plans.

This optimization aims to maintain the health and benign inflation of the ecosystem's token economy, slightly adjusting the GGC output ratio for daily basic tasks and short drama check-ins, while adding an exclusive dividend channel for users staking large amounts of tokens. By locking GGC on the platform, users can not only enjoy higher content voting rights but also share in the platform's ad revenues and game transaction fee dividends.

An official spokesperson pointed out that introducing token staking dividends can effectively lock up tokens circulating in the market, attract more long-term value investors, and let them witness the rapid growth of the Bingo Entertainment ecosystem.

item_5.title: Bingo Social first version early access starts, intelligent AI recommendation engine upgraded
item_5.desc: The first beta version of Bingo Social focuses on optimizing AI precise matching algorithms based on user interest tags and opens real-time interactive chat channels with the short drama screening rooms.
content: The highly anticipated core product of the BINGO Entertainment ecosystem, Bingo Social, has officially launched its first test version. The first batch of limited early access channels is now open to whitelisted users. This update highlights the upgraded intelligent AI interest-based recommendation engine.

Bingo Social aims to connect global pan-entertainment users who share common hobbies. In addition to conventional chatting and feed posting, the application deeply integrates short drama screening rooms and mini-game battle lobbies. Users can invite friends to watch dramas on the same screen in real-time and enable voice chat, breaking the ice naturally in entertainment scenarios.

The intelligent recommendation algorithm captures multi-dimensional features to help users quickly discover like-minded movie partners and gaming allies, creating a one-stop authentic social loop from online heart-stirring matching to offline interest aggregation.

item_6.title: BINGO Entertainment joins hands with well-known game studios to expand the new era of play-to-earn
item_6.desc: Both parties will jointly incubate multiple core online games integrated with Web3 token incentives, supporting NFTization of in-game props and achievements on the chain, achieving cross-platform interoperability and ownership validation of assets.
content: BINGO Entertainment today announced a deep strategic cooperation with a well-known game development studio in the Asia-Pacific region. The two parties will jointly develop and incubate two core online games integrated with Web3 token incentives, marking BINGO's official entry into the mid-to-large blockchain gaming market.

It is understood that both games will deeply integrate the BINGO platform's digital asset management infrastructure, allowing players to convert rare in-game items, skins, and achievements into on-chain NFTs. This guarantees absolute ownership and copyright validation of virtual assets, which can also be seamlessly traded across games.

This cooperation will give full play to BINGO's massive user base and the game studio's outstanding R&D capabilities, delivering a feast of high playability and economic benefits to players worldwide.

item_7.title: BINGO Short Drama copyright library significantly expanded, adding 100 exclusive hit dramas
item_7.desc: This month's new additions cover multiple mainstream market classifications such as romance, sweet love, comeback, mystery, fantasy, and time-travel, supporting all-terminal compatibility and offline caching, further improving the viewing experience.
content: To continuously deliver high-quality audio-visual enjoyment to global users, the BINGO Short Drama platform's copyright library welcomed its largest expansion since launch this month. It successfully introduced over a hundred exclusively signed hit dramas, covering popular themes such as romance, urban comeback, mystery, and sci-fi.

The newly launched dramas support smooth, ultra-high-definition playback across all terminals, with optimized offline caching and ultra-fast loading experiences, allowing users to watch dramas smoothly even in mobile environments with poor network conditions.

A representative of the copyright holders stated: 'BINGO's intelligent AI seamless advertising engine and highly innovative revenue distribution mechanism have brought better monetization returns to copyright owners. We will continue to join hands with BINGO to present more excellent content to global audiences.'

item_8.title: Offline community activities launch, first batch of 'Bingo Social Circle' pilot cities announced
item_8.desc: To break online communication barriers, Bingo Social will collaborate with local entertainment entities to launch offline interest salons and e-sports events in the first batch of 10 pilot cities.
content: To break the virtual isolation of online communication, Bingo Social today announced the official launch of this year's offline community salons and city partner recruitment plans, revealing the first batch of 10 core pilot cities.

The first batch of pilot cities will see the gradual rollout of 'Bingo Club' physical interest-based meetup hubs. By organizing e-sports matches, offline drama screening salons, outdoor adventures, and food tasting activities, online connections will be converted into authentic offline relationships.

The project manager expressed: 'We hope to turn Bingo Social into a warm, lifestyle-oriented network supported by physical scenarios, helping young users find like-minded friends and experience a better, real life.'

item_9.title: Platform payment gateway upgraded: supporting global mainstream payments and Web3 wallets seamless deposit
item_9.desc: The upgraded payment gateway has deeply integrated multiple global fiat payment gateways and mainstream digital wallets, allowing users to conveniently exchange and withdraw ecosystem points with one click, greatly improving deposit and withdrawal efficiency.
content: To provide a more convenient and efficient asset deposit and withdrawal experience, the core digital payment gateway of the BINGO Entertainment platform has completed a major system upgrade today. This upgrade deeply integrates multiple mainstream global fiat channels and Web3 wallets.

After the upgrade, users can conveniently exchange or withdraw platform points and GGC tokens via fiat gateways and crypto wallets with one click. Transactions arrive in seconds, and handling fees have been significantly reduced, elevating the deposit and withdrawal experience to a new level.

This technical restructuring greatly lowers the barrier for traditional Web2 users to enter the Web3 entertainment ecosystem, laying a solid foundation for wider adoption and cross-border payment settlements.
